Description:
TECHNICAL:

Debug options for scripted brushes.

Can be used with Breakpoint nodes.
Title: Debug

Options.Description: Prints the index and name of each operation from the brush.
Options.Label: Print Operations

Options.Description: Enables manual step-through mode (pause after each operation).
Options.Label: Step Through

Content.Description: Turns Breakpoint nodes on or off

Options.Description: Where debug messages are sent (Chat, Console, or Both).
Options.Label: Output Target

Options.Description: Pause on error instead of stopping the entire brush from running
Options.Label: Break On Error
